name: AAV9-mTERT
summary: Mouse telomerase gene therapy using AAV9 delivery of mouse TERT, tracked as a preclinical telomerase-restoration signal.
mechanism_summary: Delivers mouse TERT with a systemic AAV9 vector to increase telomerase activity in adult and old mice.

open_questions: Whether systemic TERT delivery can be made safe enough for human aging use
Whether lifespan and healthspan effects replicate across delivery vectors, doses, and genetic backgrounds
